# Skyview Sunset building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: skyview-sunset-1511-n-fairfax-ave
- Address: 1511 N. Fairfax Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.skyviewsunset.com/
- Management company: SRG Residential
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site notes digital package reception, gated access, EV charging, covered parking, and a rooftop sky deck with hot tub. Source: Skyview Sunset official site (https://www.skyviewsunset.com/). Note: Current official materials support package reception, gated access, EV charging, covered parking, and rooftop sky-deck amenities.
- [review] Apartments.com currently shows no renter reviews, leaving operating quality under-documented. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/skyview-sunset-los-angeles-ca/s011r94/). Note: The public profile stated there were no renter reviews yet.

## Open questions
- Verify whether there is a real gym, whether any units face Sunset/Fairfax noise, and whether hot tub is the only water amenity.

## Notes
Research complete, but not yet advanced. The building checks several operational boxes on paper, yet review depth is effectively nonexistent and the Sunset/Fairfax location creates an obvious external-noise question.
